Kunzar Cloak  
 

Lore Item
Slot: BACK
AC: 7
WIS: +2 INT: +2
SV FIRE: +10
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL except HUM ERU HEF DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Kunzar Cloak
Lore Item
Slot: BACK
AC: 7
WIS: +2 INT: +2
SV FIRE: +10
WT: 0.1 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL
Race: ALL except HUM ERU HEF DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

Item Type:Armor
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:88 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:204
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2022-01-19 12:06:39
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: 100pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Uncommon
Level to Attain: 35

NPC Name
spectral librarian

Karnor's Castle

caller of Sathir

Zone Name
Kaesora
Karnor's Castle

Send a correction
Post Comment
Race restrictions
QuoteReply
# Oct 13 2017 at 3:00 AM Rating: Decent
animekenji
1,123 posts
The race restrictions seem to be centered around those with human blood in them but if that's true, then shouldn't Barbarians also be restricted from using this as they are just the bigger, stronger cousins of humans?
____________________________
If you were me and I were you, would we still be friends?
▲ Page top
Frogloks...
QuoteReply
# Mar 20 2003 at 6:42 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
Frogloks can also wear this.
▲ Page top

QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2003 at 10:33 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251709006
145 posts
Well my friend. If you picked one up for 20pp I suggest you put on your sundays best ( cha 100+ ) And Resell to a Vendor for 83pp ! ! ! !
▲ Page top
cheap
QuoteReply
# May 21 2002 at 3:07 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756559386
3 posts
lol, bought one for 20pp yesterday :P
Great for low level casters with the AC and int.

-primur
12nec(BB)
▲ Page top
Got one
QuoteReply
# Apr 11 2002 at 7:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760954660
View User Forum
19 posts
Just picked one up from a guy in FV for 90pp, was happy to get a back item with wis for my Barb Shammy
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Mar 19 2002 at 1:36 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Pretty crappy except as a peice of resist gear for someone 40-50.
not really
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2002 at 6:09 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591770667323
39 posts
It just depends at what lvl you got it, I bought it for 100pp on my server for my cler 29 (170 wis actually and not twinked) and i'm very happy with it. Wis or Int gear for back slot are not the easiest to find, and even if 2 int/wis is not a lot, it s still ok when you want to fill most of your slots with wis and ac gear. And 10 SvFire is very nice too.



▲ Page top
RE: crappy
QuoteReply
# Mar 23 2002 at 1:31 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592253456573
47 posts
i think u are wrong wis on a back item is rare so it is a good item
▲ Page top
RE: crappy
QuoteReply
# Apr 10 2002 at 10:38 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252860728
4 posts
I wouldn't call it crappy. It isn't something I'd wear all the time, but for fighting Eejag or Faydedar and the like, this is a nice piece of resist gear. I like mine :)
▲ Page top
RE: crappy
QuoteReply
# May 13 2003 at 5:04 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591765525919
Scholar
748 posts
My troll beastlord loves it, because it gives him wis AND fire resistance, both things trolls have very little of, hehe.

Edited, Tue May 13 05:24:08 2003
▲ Page top
Common KC drops
QuoteReply
# Mar 11 2002 at 1:42 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591775119867
84 posts
I'd say this item is more likely a common drop rather than an "uncommon" one. I've seen 6 drop in the last 2 days I've been fighting in KC. They're common enough that neither groups that had them drop rolled on them. Curses to LORE. Guess I'll just sell to a merchy and go back fer some more :)
Luck in battle,
Bulvar Biggins
Dwarf Warrior
Divine Union of Souls
▲ Page top
Races
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2002 at 8:12 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592250912749
Sage
74 posts
Definately Not All/All...

Just got the point where I was hunting KC when I got this cloak as a drop. I was tickled. Here I am a level 49 Enc (at the time) and still wearing a cloak of the icebear. Finally something with INT for my back. But lo and behold...Only Large and Small Races...no Erudites, Humans, Half-elves...Totally upset my plans for world domination...

So still here I am with drops from Maiden's Eye and The Hole on me, but still I wear a stinking Cold Cloak I got by accident 20 levels ago when that darn barb decided he didn't like Erudites...>sigh<

Good Job Verant hehe
▲ Page top
RE: Races
QuoteReply
# Jul 23 2002 at 6:36 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752043081
82 posts
I was reading that and I started to think of "Tommy Boy". 'Fat man in a little coat' I mean if the little races can wear, and most the mid races, PLUS the large races, heh, what's wrong with the halfelves, humans and erudites donning this? Who goes to the tailor after looting this, the halfling or the troll ??? Just funny is all . I do understand that all the races that can wear this could be considered magic beings, so no non humans.

'So who's your favorite little rascal?...Alfalfa or Spankey? "

Edited, Tue Jul 23 19:32:56 2002
▲ Page top
Race was changed
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2002 at 12:37 PM Rating: Decent
Durden
View User Forum
45 posts
Barabarians can now wear these. Not sure why they can but humans still can't.

Durdaen Darkpoint
Lvl120 Dark Elf Assassin
EMarr

Trying to buy/sell things on these forums is pretty pointless. You would have a 1000x better chance of getting an item by auctioning for it on your own server. You DO realize there are several servers, right? There is probably a "Naxon" on every one. :P

More like common
QuoteReply
# Dec 04 2001 at 10:31 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248758846
View User Forum
161 posts
This item should be more like common..Seems like 3 out of the 5 Spectral Librarians we killed while camping and pulling to fountain dropped the Cloak..We all also got Ransacker Packs, 1 spirit tome, a Kunzar Mantle and that Spectral Shield..well good hunting and safe journey to all.

cloak

just bought one for 100pp great deal on a cloak with these stats

Human Druid
QuoteReply
# Sep 09 2001 at 3:40 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591767028046
6 posts
Hi,

Please note this item shows up when you do an item search for Human Druid wisdom items.

Check the picture above - human's can't wear it.
▲ Page top
RE: Human Druid
QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2001 at 7:57 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
Yeah, However, human druids get the crystal covered shroud for a chest item, which is awesome. It all basically evens out. get yourself a molten cloak instead, and your way ahead of the poor elf or halfling in their foreman's tunic and kunzar cloak.

# Jun 22 2002 at 12:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252450297

204 posts
I don't think they were complaining about not being able to wear it, but rather that it showed up under a search for human druid items when it's NOT a human druid item... Just what i got from the post.
▲ Page top
Good cloak
QuoteReply
# Sep 01 2001 at 1:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592248726897
28 posts
Pretty happy about this, just bought it for 90 plat on Xev. As a shammy its pretty decent, low ac but i think the fire sv and wis make up for it. Sure beats banded anyway.
Chastize 24 iskar shammy
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 21 2001 at 11:55 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Well, as I narrowed the search to monk only items...I found this piece and was a bit excited to see it was monk equippable. Sad part is that only a damned iksar monk can wear it. Human monks got shafted here it seems. It just goes to show ya that again we have to watch for the all/all crap to see if we too can wear it since alot of our stuff isn't great.
RE: AND TO THINK
QuoteReply
# Sep 22 2001 at 6:03 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249498503
56 posts
You guys get a lot of stuff that ikky's can't wear either.
▲ Page top
fr is best bit
QuoteReply
# Jun 05 2001 at 3:02 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757120472
10 posts
This cloak is ok but the best bit about it is the AC+7 SvFire+10... it's hard to find decent Vox/Naggy raid gear which drops regularly and doesn't destroy your AC. This is one of those items :)
I haven't spent much time in Kaesora, but I've seen four of these drop in KC in only one week of hunting there.
